scripts.start: concurrently "cd ./back && npm run server" "cd ./front && npm start"
scripts.docker:push:back: docker tag pserver-back-image:latest philipsung/pserver-back-image:latest && docker push philipsung/pserver-back-image:latest
scripts.docker:push:web: docker tag pserver-web-image:latest philipsung/pserver-web-image:latest && docker push philipsung/pserver-web-image:latest
scripts.kube:secrets: kubectl create secret generic pserver-back-env --from-env-file=back/.env.production --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
scripts.kube:apply:back: kubectl apply -f k8s/pserver-back-deployment.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/pserver-back-service.yaml
scripts.kube:apply:web: kubectl apply -f k8s/pserver-web-deployment.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/pserver-web-service.yaml
scripts.kube:apply:all: npm run kube:secrets && npm run kube:apply:back && npm run kube:apply:web
scripts.deploy:back: npm run docker:build:back && npm run docker:push:back && npm run kube:apply:back
scripts.deploy:web: npm run docker:build:web && npm run docker:push:web && npm run kube:apply:web
scripts.deploy:all: npm run kube:secrets && npm run deploy:back && npm run deploy:web
